title: notifications core — cache keys + tags
description: Every cache key is tagged with `notifications`. Composite tags used for tenant-scoped or user-scoped invalidation. Follows foundation's cache namespacing convention (each module owns its module-name tag + composite tags for scoped invalidation).

keys.description: The full category registry — every module's notifications.json aggregated. Loaded at boot + refreshed every 30m via warm-registries. Rarely invalidated except on ConfigReloaded or CategoryRegistered.
Per-tenant template registry — platform defaults + tenant overrides, keyed by tenant. Invalidated on TemplatePublished for the tenant or when a platform default changes.
Per-user resolved preferences map (category, channel) → (enabled, digest_mode, quiet_hours). Read on every dispatch. Invalidated on PreferenceUpdated for the user.
Cached recipient payload (email, phone, name, locale, timezone) used in event-carried-state dispatch payloads. Refreshed on UserUpdated via RefreshUserCacheJob (uniqueFor 60s save-storm collapse).
Per-user unseen-notification count for the bell badge. Read very frequently. Invalidated on notification create + on notifications-seen updates.
Digest accumulator for a specific window. Notifications route into this key as they queue with digest_mode≠immediate. Cleared by ProcessDigestJob on delivery.
Cached tenant branding block (logo_url, primary_color, sender_identity, postal_address) used in every event-carried-state payload. Refreshed on tenant Branding update events.
